title: Petamenes gracilis
taxonomy: Petamenes gracilis is classified as a species of wasp within the family Masaridae. This classification places it within the order Hymenoptera and the class Insecta. The genus Petamenes is part of the subfamily Astatinae, and further categorized into the infraorder Aculeata. The kingdom in which Petamenes gracilis resides is Animalia. It is a part of the phylum Arthropoda.
